_localeReview.fileNote: JSON does not allow // comments; this object is the machine-readable review status for this locale.
outstandingItems: 1. Framing: Dimension labels cleaned of review tags; cohort/support blocks still partly English — full native Twi pass and ethics wording review required.
2. Scales: Questionnaire Likert strings not localised in this file — map Strongly agree/disagree to Akan communicative norms.
3. Context: Dimension E uses Ghana-centric Ubuntu framing — validate for all Twi/Akan deployment contexts; question-bank scenarios need regional audit separately.
4. Consent: ethics_consent strings mix Twi and English — harmonise and vet "research" / storage wording for local history and trust.
5. Thinking style: Cognitive dimension titles/descriptions are draft — ensure "adwene" / tendency language does not read as medical or stigmatising.

welcome.title: Wo nim wo ho
welcome.subtitle: Ɛyɛ dwumadi a ɛboa yɛn ahu adwene ne akwan a nnipa foforo so dwen no mu yɛɛteɛne.

results.title: Wo nkomo mu nsem
results.group_insights_hint: Opens aggregate guidance when cohort insights are enabled.

cohortInsights.guidance_tagline: Insight → action · Practical orientation for teams and facilitators—reflection prompts from pooled patterns.
cohortInsights.page_intro: This view turns pooled patterns into practical ideas for environments and facilitation—group-level shapes and suggestions for conversation.
cohortInsights.aggregate_only: No individual results appear here; only group-level shapes and suggestions.
cohortInsights.dynamics_lead: Neutral read on differences that may coexist.
cohortInsights.confidence_tooltip: Probabilistic insights from patterns—not definitive conclusions.
cohortInsights.footer_uncertainty: Use these notes to prompt conversation and small experiments alongside your own professional judgment.

supportInsights.heading: Support insights
supportInsights.intro: Early hints based on your response field—suggestions you might explore alongside your own judgment.

F.title: Ahwehwɛ a ɛyɛ den
F.low_label: Da so ara wɔ adwene mu
F.high_label: Tumi a wotumi de ahwehwɛ to baabi ara
F.description: Ɛkyerɛ sɛnea wode ahwehwɛ to dwuma baako so sen sɛnea wobɛsesa bere a ahintasɛm ba.

P.title: Nhwɛso ne mfonini adwene
P.low_label: Adwene a ɛyɛ konkrete, akwan so
P.high_label: Ahunu a ɛwɔ mfonini ne nhyehyɛe mu
P.description: Ɛkasa ho dwuma a ɛyɛ konkrete ne bere a wohunu nhyehyɛe ne mmara a ɛda adi no ho.

S.title: Asɛm a ɛfiri honam ne adwene so
S.description: Kwan a kwan pa, ɔkasa, ne nea wode ka ho dwuma no bɔ wo ahosuo anaa w’adwene.

E.title: Bɔ a ɛfiri nnipa nkabom mu (Ubuntu: ‘me yɛ ɛnam ɔfoforo so’)
E.high_label: Sɛ me ne nnipa tena hɔ a, me kra brɛ
E.description: Wɔ Ghana ne Afrika Anaafoɔ mu, nnipa yɛ nkɔsoɔ: yɛte sɛ ‘me yɛ ɛnam ɔfoforo so’ (Ubuntu). Saa dwumadi yi nso hwehwɛ sɛnea wo kra ne nnipa nkabom bɔ: sɛ nnipa ma wo ahoɔden anaa sɛ bere tenten a, w’ahia aduanan bere. Eyi nyɛ sɛ wommɔ obi kwan — ɛyɛ ho adwene a ɛfa honam ne bere ho.

R.title: Ɔkwan a wopɛ a ɛyɛ hyehyɛ ne bere
R.low_label: Mepɛ sɛ me si akwan so bere a ɛsesa
R.high_label: Mepɛ bere a wɔahyɛ ato mu ne adwuma a ato hɔ
R.description: Wɔ sunsum mu ne aduanan bere mu, ‘Ghana bere’ ne nkabom dwuma tumi ma adwene pa fifiri ‘bere a wɔde ato hɔ’ ho kɔ ‘bere a Onyankopɔn de ma’ so. Saa nkabom yi bɛtumi ayɛ hyehyɛ a ɛyɛ mmerɛwae sen klɔk nko ara. Saa dwumadi yi bisae sɛnea wopɛ hyehyɛ a ɛda adi sen sɛnea wogye tom kwan a ɛsesa.

C.title: Adwene a ɛtumi sesa
C.high_label: Metumi ne nea ɛnyɛ daadaa ne nsesa di nkɔmmɔ
C.description: Sɛnea wotumi sesa w’adwene bere a nsɛm nni mu anaa ɛsesa.

T.title: Bere ne bere nhwehwɛmu
T.low_label: Bere tumi ma me nnu hɔ
T.description: Sɛnea wote bere anim anaa wode wo ho to bere a ɛrekɔ so no so.

I.title: Nimdeɛ a ɛfiri honam mu
I.low_label: Nimdeɛ a ɛfiri honam mu no ketewa
I.high_label: Nimdeɛ a ɛfiri honam mu no den
I.description: Sɛnea wuhu sɛnea wo honam te — akoma, akɔn, brɛ.

A.title: Adwene a ɛde nsem bom
A.high_label: Nkabom a ɛtrɛw, adwene pa bebree
A.description: Sɛnea ideɛ no bɔ ho anaa ɛte baabi foforo so.

V.title: Ɔkasae ne mfonini adwene
V.high_label: Mfonini ne beae a ɛwɔ honam so
V.description: Sɛnea ɔkasae anaa mfonini di kan wɔ w’adwene mu.

sms_profile.title: Profile from SMS code
sms_profile.intro: Paste compact code from results page. Approximate deciles for quick orientation—reflection only.
sms_profile.twilio_note: SMS needs Twilio backend — not in this repo.

ethics_consent.storage_notice: Ɛdwuma yi sie nhomasua wɔ wo browsers mu — na sɛ wo to mu a, wɔ ahokyere research server so (obiarɛ nnim). Ɛnhɔ nhomasua a ɛda wo ho adi pa ara wɔ nhwehwɛ yi mu.
ethics_consent.storage_notice_local: Session data are stored locally in this browser. The assessment flow does not collect your name, email, or postal address.
ethics_consent.storage_notice_cloud_extra: This deployment has optional cloud storage: if you continue, anonymous session summaries may sync to the configured research database (see Privacy). If cloud storage is not in use, nothing leaves this device except what you export or share.
ethics_consent.privacy_body: Synaptic Four (Stuttgart) sie ahokyere session ID, bere bere no, wo mmuaeɛ, bere a ɛfa mmuaeɛ ho, ne statistical summaries ma nhwehwɛ so. Yɛnnɔ wo din, email, anaa adrɛsi wɔ ɔhaw yi mu — gye sɛ wo ntɛm yɛn kwa (ɛno ara na ɛyɛ dwuma foforo). Nhomasua pa ara: hwɛ «Privacy» / ahodeɛ ho sɔkabɔ ho nhoma wɔ footer no mu anaa /privacy.
ethics_consent.privacy_body_local: Synaptic Four (Stuttgart) uses an anonymous session identifier, timestamps, your answers, response times, and derived statistical summaries for this tool. By default these stay in this browser for your session. We do not collect your name, email, or postal address in this flow unless you contact us separately (then it is a separate processing context).
ethics_consent.privacy_body_cloud_extra: When optional cloud storage is enabled for this deployment, the same pseudonymous fields may be written to the configured research database if sync succeeds. Full privacy notice: “Privacy” in the footer or /privacy.
ethics_consent.rights_body: Wobɛtumi gyae bere biara a wopɛ a ɛnhɔ wo so. Wobɛtumi hwehwɛ sɛ epra nhomasua a ɛka wo session ID ho — fa «Delete my data» so wɔ nhomasua krataafa no so (sɛ wo de si mu). Ntɛm: contact@synapticfour.com. Ahodeɛ ho akwan — hwɛ Privacy nhoma no.

operatorSync.env_on: Cloud env: variables set (writes can still fail at runtime).
operatorSync.env_off: Cloud env: not set — no research database upload in this build.
operatorSync.last_never: Last remote write: none logged in this browser yet.

docsPages.validation_intro: Validation status document (English; native Twi summary pending review).

site_footer.nav_label: La mbra ne ahodoɔ a wɔ fa baabi foforo
site_footer.prototype_line: Research prototype for reflection and open science — maps cognitive tendencies.
